series_metadata.series_description: Records contain all current Video Lottery Terminal Racetrack Applications, Agreements and third-party reports. Each application and agreement identifies the business ownership, name, address, credit references, answers to questions pertinent to O.R.C. 3770 and applicant’s notarized signature. The application and agreement is used for approval of Video Lottery Terminal Racetrack License to sell Ohio Lottery products.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Maintain digital copy of all application materials six (6) years and one (1) day termination of agreement
